info.title: Inspector Roofing AI Query Intelligence Public-Safe API

post.summary: Map sanitized prompt/query lines to homeowner education themes.
Route public-safe roof labels to proof-gallery concepts.
Build a carrier-safe evidence packet from sanitized notes and labels.
Return JSON-LD source-spine feed for LLM ingestion.

private_corpus_boundary.status: private production corpus, not included in this public repository

public_release_boundary.public_sample_strategy: publish taxonomy, schemas, aggregate proof concepts, and sanitized example records only

excluded_use: public release of customer records or raw private images
